A lifebelt tells the graphic story of a shipwreck off the Lizard peninsula in which the crew were rescued in desperate circumstances

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Footage of animals that have unusual means of finding their way around. Dung beetles are able to navigate by the sky, using the position of the sun, moon and stars to determine which is the right direction to go in, while pigeons display remarkable powers of memory, able to recall complex travel routes and follow manmade roads and hedgerows

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their father's eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldn't replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Bolton-based bricklayer Paul Rimmer, who has spent his career restoring and renovating Victorian terrace houses, sets his sights on constructing a state-of-the-art home on a budget of £350,000. However, instead of using the construction materials he has spent the past 40 years mastering, he has opted to build his new home from wood. Roping in his wife Carol, daughter Abby and a selection of favoured workmates, Paul and his team begin work on the ultra-modern, five-bedroom build, and Kevin McCloud reveals how extreme weather, exhaustion, and rapidly dwindling funds place the entire project in jeopardy

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Denise van Outen and her partner Eddie, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Zoe Ball and her son Woody Cook, Martin Kemp and son Roman, Maureen Lipman and Gyles Brandreth, Johnny Vegas and his PA Bev, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Emilia Fox and Joanna David, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Laura Whitmore and Iain Stirling, Rylan Clark-Neal and his mum Linda, Georgia Taylor and Sunetra Sarker and Susanna Reid and Rob Rinder critique programmes including Blue Planet II, Unsolved Mysteries, It Chapter Two, Antiques Roadshow, Basic Instinct and news reports on the coronavirus

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The North West of England is the focus of this week's search as Kirstie Allsopp tries to help Matthew and Kieran find a bigger home in Blackpool. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer is in the Lake District with Diana, a climber who has fallen for the charms of Cumbria. Having relocated from Scotland, she is currently sofa surging with her sister and living out of the back of her car - can Phil finally help her put down roots?

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: Documentary following West Midlands Ambulance Service at the peak of the Covid-19 pandemic in April, from the perspective of the crews, control room staff and managers as they deal with the human cost of the biggest ever challenge to the service. To get more ambulances onto the frontline, managers deploy student paramedics, with 21-year-old Sam and 20-year-old Caitlyn encountering patients with breathing difficulties, in care homes, and with mental health issues that appear isolation-related

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen host the quarter-final of the baking contest, with the five best teams returning for their most gruelling challenges yet. In the first round, they teams must create 24 macarons and 24 cocktail-inspired desserts, in just three and a half hours. For the second round, they must combine sugar and chocolate work to create a spectacular showpiece that incorporates an edible game for judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden to play before they decide who is going through to the semi-final

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and James Widdas run the Rose and Crown in Edgworth, near Bolton, and hope to provide boutique on a budget, but veterans Alison and Lynda are quick to find fault

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nigel and Pok U Regan hope to impress their fellow hoteliers with their east-meets-west atmosphere at Bingham Townhouse, a B&B and Cantonese restaurant in Nottinghamshire

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Float by Boat near Rugby, partners Kev Argent and Tor Johnson run mindfulness breaks from their narrowboat, but Alison and Lynda are not keen on the tiny shared bathroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Architectural technician Alex Pithouse hosts the second dinner party in Dundee, and aims to impress his guests by giving them an education in fine dining, complete with a complex menu and some good wines, as well as by introducing them to his three pet ferrets

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian Hannah Wilson prepares an Italian feast for her guests in Dundee, and in a bid to win over her carnivore guests she devises a cunning plan that involves dishing up some meat with the starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces

programme.desc: The Morgan Motor Company provides unrestricted access to the factory floors, opening its doors to reveal how its £90,000 Plus Six sports car is made, with 170 craftspeople using classic coach-building techniques

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ethical trader Donna Trafford hosts the second night in Peterborough, and plans to wow her guests with a colourful evening of tasty food and relaxed fun in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in Peterborough, glamour model and columnist Susie Hutson is out to prove she's not the dizzy blonde some of the guests assume she is - and it doesn't take long for ethical trader Donna Trafford and would-be rapper Warren Temple to make an unexpected discovery that proves there's more to Susie than meets the eye

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking businesswomen Vicki Culverhouse hosts the fourth night of the competition in Peterborough. She surprises the group when she unleashes some poetry at the dinner table, after having been very direct with the other diners throughout the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Veterinary nurse Robin Hills is the final host of the competition in Peterborough. He prepares an animal-themed evening, accompanied by well-presented cuisine, which he hopes will be a big hit with his guests

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Following a recent health scare, beauty consultant Marcelle and coach company owner Graeme are seizing the moment and about to buy a holiday home in western Malaga for stress-free holidays together. They'd love to find an apartment near the buzzing town of Benalmádena with a communal pool and private outdoor space and have given Jasmine Harman a budget of £120,000 to find the perfect property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Creative Brighton couple Emily and Peter Harold have been holidaying on the Spanish island of Mallorca for 14 years, and are determined to buy a second home there. They're looking for somewhere to relax and soak up the sun and culture on offer in their favourite spot of Port de Soller. Laura Hamilton shows them five apartments for their £250,000 budge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Smithson Farm in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire, where Carole and Harry Johnson hope their glampsite gives their guests a taste of the great outdoors

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Shaun have an interesting challenge on their hands with retired couple Lee and Fiona from Lancashire and their budget of 180,000 euros

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A recurring dream makes Frasier wonder whether he is gay, prompting him to search for an explanation of its meaning - with a little help from Niles. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin makes friends with reclusive author TH Houghton, to the considerable dismay of Niles and Frasier, who are frustrated that their own attempts to strike up an acquaintance have failed dismally. Comedy, guest starring Robert Prosky (Hill Street Blues), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Mariam and Nasser, from the West Midlands, find a family holiday home they can eventually retire to in the countryside of Murcia, south-east Spain. The couple used to live near Madrid and desperately miss the Spanish sunshine and way of life, especially the outdoor cooking. Laura has five sizzling hot properties to show them for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Phil and Caroline Mansell from Wales have been holidaying together in the La Marina Alta region of Spain's Costa Blanca for years. Phil, who suffers from severe arthritis, finds the climate helps his symptoms so they are selling their home back in the UK and are planning a full-time move. Ben Hillman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget, but will any of them be their dream home?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: The Morgan Motor Company provides unrestricted access to the factory floors, opening its doors to reveal how its £90,000 Plus Six sports car is made, with 170 craftspeople using classic coach-building techniques

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Denise van Outen and her partner Eddie, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Zoe Ball and her son Woody Cook, Martin Kemp and son Roman, Maureen Lipman and Gyles Brandreth, Johnny Vegas and his PA Bev, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Emilia Fox and Joanna David, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Laura Whitmore and Iain Stirling, Rylan Clark-Neal and his mum Linda, Georgia Taylor and Sunetra Sarker and Susanna Reid and Rob Rinder critique programmes including Blue Planet II, Unsolved Mysteries, It Chapter Two, Antiques Roadshow, Basic Instinct and news reports on the coronavirus

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Pop star Samuel Preston shot to fame when he fell in love with Chantelle Houghton inside the Big Brother house. He wonders whether lightning will strike again on his date with South African Nichole. Gogglebox star and TV presenter Scarlett Moffatt is hoping that martial arts fighter Tommy will prove to be full of banter and happy to see her 'without her fake tan on'. Entrepreneur Jo Wood seeks someone who shares her love of a good time, while Britain's Got Talent winner Ashleigh Butler hopes fellow dog-lover Elliot will live up to her - and Pudsey's - expectations

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A look back at some of Noel Fitzpatrick's most memorable cases including 18-month-old chihuahua Darcy, who suffered a crushed pelvis after being hit by a car, rendering her unable to walk. X-rays revealed at least seven fractures, meaning Noel had to operate on a microscopic scale. The programme also features three-legged cat Jersey, whose sole back leg was taking so much strain that he needed knee surgery, and deerhound Willow, suffering from a suspected broken neck after a horrific accident

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Bolton-based bricklayer Paul Rimmer, who has spent his career restoring and renovating Victorian terrace houses, sets his sights on constructing a state-of-the-art home on a budget of £350,000. However, instead of using the construction materials he has spent the past 40 years mastering, he has opted to build his new home from wood. Roping in his wife Carol, daughter Abby and a selection of favoured workmates, Paul and his team begin work on the ultra-modern, five-bedroom build, and Kevin McCloud reveals how extreme weather, exhaustion, and rapidly dwindling funds place the entire project in jeopardy

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Spanish architect Jaime and his wife Mimi as they embark on a mission to convert a Grade II listed folly into a family home in Buckinghamshire. Giving themselves a wildly optimistic six-month deadline to finish before the birth of their second child, it's not long before the couple hit trouble. Jaime puts all his energies and creativity into the project, using innovative 3D mapping to squeeze living spaces into the tower, but it proves to be an exhausting struggle

programme.title: The Real EastEnders
programme.desc: Filmed in the summer of 2019 by first-time director Ashley Francis-Roy, this documentary presents the world as seen through the eyes of children growing up on council estates on the Isle of Dogs. Brendan is a sixth-generation Islander who's lived with his nan Lynne since he was placed in care when he was four, while 12-year-old Leslie wants to be an electrician, as well as a part-time rapper and gamer - but his mum Tina worries about him hanging out with boys who seek respect and easy money

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Creative Brighton couple Emily and Peter Harold have been holidaying on the Spanish island of Mallorca for 14 years, and are determined to buy a second home there. They're looking for somewhere to relax and soak up the sun and culture on offer in their favourite spot of Port de Soller. Laura Hamilton shows them five apartments for their £250,000 budge

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to Paris to find out why baguettes go stale so much faster than sliced loaves of bread. Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to investigate why buffalo mozzarella is much more expensive than that from cows and Briony May Williams discovers the surprising secret to the making of mushy peas

programme.desc: Dick tries to rehabilitate a criminal but ends up doing more harm than good, while Harry struggles to write a book report. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Jane Curtin, Kristen Johnston and French Stewart

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan has trouble deciding whether he should take his much younger girlfriend to Jake's birthday party, afraid his former wife Judith will not approve. Meanwhile, Rose tries to get her boyfriend to act more like Charlie. Starring Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is nominated for an advertising award but decides to boycott the ceremony, having lost to a rival several years in a row. The rest of the family try to con him into going. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan encounters financial problems when he starts paying for all his girlfriend's bills, and gets into trouble with Judith for not paying his alimony cheque on time. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake's teacher calls a meeting with Alan and Judith to discuss the youngster's lack of interest at school, and Alan falls for Francine - upon realising his relationship with girlfriend Kandi is missing something. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments. Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriff Paul Bohill tackles the case of a small debt owed by ex-footballer Neil 'Razor' Ruddock to a kennel owner, before being forced to evict a school dinner lady in south London. Meanwhile, in the north of England enforcement agent Stewart MacCracken heads out with trainee Iain Taylor to confront a Yorkshire builder they need to get payment from at his home, while a reptile shop owner hit by online competitors urgently needs to pay a debt for the feed company he relies on to keep his animals alive

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Enforcement officers are faced with the difficult job of evicting a woman with two children - a task that takes a turn for the worse when her ex-partner makes an appearance. In Liverpool, locals threaten a riot over an unpaid debt at a computer shop, while two agents come across an extremely rare car in the course of their duties

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A man has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After a four-year nightmare with the tenants of a cottage in north Wales, landlady Rachel gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property. Elsewhere, the Peterborough Council gets a tip-off which leads them to find a property with life-threatening electrics and damp, that could potentially be an overcrowded slum

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over £20,000 behind with his mortgage, and the developers of an old swimming pool in Bristol discover that they are liable for the electricity that the building's squatters have been using

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: The Others (2001)
programme.desc: A woman awaits the return of her husband from the Second World War while struggling to care for her son and daughter. Both children suffer a violent reaction when exposed to daylight, forcing her to keep much of their isolated home on the island of Jersey shrouded in gloom. When the pair claim to see strangers in the house, their terrified mother begins to suspect that the souls of the dead are stalking the halls. Period supernatural thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Fionnula Flanagan, Alakina Mann, James Bentley and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Brian Conville gives a man a dressing-down for dangerous driving on the school run, and Barry Peach's detective skills come to the fore when he apprehends a fugitive who has been using a false identity. Meanwhile, during an initiative to clamp down on rural crime, officers from Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit find themselves pursuing some stolen tractors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan Brigginshaw is kept on his toes when a suspect does a runner, a routine vehicle check turns into a drug bust for Suzie Ranyard, and Barry Peach has his hands full when a group of Scottish revellers clash with bouncers in Skegness. Elsewhere, Jim Woolerton and Jason Baxter catch out a rookie rider who is breaking the law

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Roxy puts Kyle on the spot by asking him why they are not together, and Bea is thrown when Levi begs her to keep his seizures a secret

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Evan reveals that he only has months to live, Ryder, Roo and Alf insist he moves in with them. Tane and Ari navigate a tense situation, and Colby commences his investigation

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary following the inhabitants of the seaside village of Jaywick in Essex, where more than half of the residents are on state welfare. Tony Taylor claims £51.40 a week and does odd jobs in exchange for food, enabling his benefits money to go a bit further, while Claire has moved from east London's Canning Town in search of a better life with her fiance Luke, their young baby and her two older children, who live with a host of pets in a two-bedroom house

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This edition focuses on young people living on state welfare, including 18-year-old Dean from Harlow in Essex, who has no intention of getting a job unless forced. Twentysomethings Danielle and her boyfriend Josh are unable to work due to anxiety and depression and have moved to Blackpool to make a new start. However, with four children between them from previous relationships and another on the way they are struggling to make ends meet on a joint benefits income of around £100 a week

programme.title: Ian Huntley: 5 Mistakes That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: A look at the murders of schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman by Ian Huntley in 2002, focusing on errors made by the killer during the subsequent investigation - without which he might have walked free. Contributors include the man who put Huntley behind bars, former Detective Chief Superintendent Chris Stevenson, giving his first interview since the trial

programme.title: Hoarders: Stockpile Avalanche
programme.desc: Observational documentary taking a look at a selection of people whose homes are extremely cluttered due to hoarding. In north London, 40-year-old Faye has become overwhelmed by her compulsive shopping. programme.desc: Jon Moon and his dog Kanto are hot on the heels of some burglary suspects, while spot-checks by the unit on the A1 turn up a carrier bag full of cash. Jason Baxter rushes to the scene of an accident where the driver was thrown clear of the car, only for another crash to take place - this time involving a line of vehicles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, Sarah gives a bad-boy biker an early birthday present and Jim's Audi S3 is outclassed by a car 30 years its senior. Plus, Mike is left open-mouthed when he encounters a drink-driver who is three times over the limit

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Desperate for mates, Emmett is sorely tempted when a gang of boys invite him to hang out, and Sheila is shocked when Kyle reveals he and Roxy are officially a couple

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Evan is concerned Ryder is putting his life on hold to care for him. Colby follows up with Gemma, assuring her the finger printing is to rule her out as a suspect

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Police officers monitor events as thousands of protesters wearing V for Vendetta masks march to the Houses of Parliament

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. At one of London's busiest stations, vigilant inspectors Scott and Michelle have success intercepting repeat offenders, but will they catch a notorious passenger who the station staff report comes through their station each day?

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: The specialist clinic opens its doors to patients with acne, psoriasis and cysts. Dr Natalia Spierings treats 42-year-old Shaneef's shoulder lipoma, Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a large head cyst, and Dr Dev Shah comes under fire over his lack of music knowledge. Plus, psoriasis-sufferer John feels he's exhausted all the options for treatment, but can Dr Emma McMullen offer him a ray of hope?

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Return of the documentary looking at how people buy, sell and market sex, hearing from an array of individuals working within Britain's multimillion-pound industry. In the first edition, aficionados and retailers reveal why they believe sex dolls are set to revolutionise the nation's lives

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary looks at a hidden world of pensioners who are selling sex when most people of their age are planning their funerals. Those featured include Norm, an 85-year-old former priest now enjoying a new career as a porn star, and 72-year-old transgender escort Pippa Jane

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: A disparate group of young sex workers reveal what life is really like trying to make a living as escorts, cammers and sex entrepreneurs. The film explores why these young women decided to 'stop giving it away for free', revealing in the process how materialism has collided with a new age of sexual pragmatism

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will goads Grace into seeing his therapist, but is stricken with pangs of jealousy when he learns the two women have formed a close friendship. Meanwhile, Karen acquires a pair of glasses and begins to see everything more clearly - including Jack's many flaws. Sharon Stone guest stars

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack arranges a date on behalf of Will, while Grace attends her father Martin's birthday party and convinces Karen to come along. Unfortunately, no one else turns up, and the event proves to be a wash-out. Alan Arkin, Lee Majors and Debbie Reynolds guest

programme.title: Columbo: The Greenhouse Jungle (1972)
programme.desc: A penniless rare-plant collector, desperate for funds to support his expensive hobby, fakes his nephew's kidnapping to get his hands on a trust fund. However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: Columbo: A Deadly State of Mind (1975)
programme.desc: A philandering psychiatrist, who involved his mistress in a series of hypnosis experiments, kills her husband in the heat of the moment when the pair are caught out. He persuades his distraught lover to make up a story involving two burglars, but Lt Columbo realises she is lying and goes in search of the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magician disappears during a live-burial trick and is later found dead miles away from the location of his performance. Goren and Eames' investigation takes them deep into the mysterious world of magic as they try to unravel the conjuror's final act to identify the murderer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When young investment banker Zoe White accuses billionaire client Eli Colton of rape, a past 'victim' of Eli's is discovered, though her payoff included a nondisclosure agreement. Zoe gets cold feet just before trial when she is made an offer she struggles to refuse - a job in Europe with a salary of $5million. However, Benson is deternined to see justice done

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A computer genius is accused of murdering his girlfriend, but responds to the team's investigation by threatening to expose their darkest secrets

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man convicted of rape is exonerated and released 16 years later. However, on the night of his release, the daughter of the woman he was convicted of raping is also raped and murdered - and he is SVU's prime suspect. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man uses a fake identity to lure a woman into bed, destroying her family, so Barba tries to get him convicted of rape - only to face a sceptical legal team. Raul Esparza stars

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: The agency's license comes under threat and Laura investigates a senatorial candidate

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is abducted during a carjacking, but the only link to the missing child is an ex-convict, who proves unwilling to help police with their investigations. As the threat to the victim's safety grows, McCoy is forced to contemplate agreeing to a deal that would compromise his most deeply held principles. Guest starring Adam Arkin, with Sam Waterston, Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The discovery of human bones in a ravine re-opens a 15-year-old missing persons case, and Swarek teams up with his old training officer, Charlie Walsh, in an effort to solve it. He is shocked when he sees the flaws of his mentor's personal life at close quarters, and starts to think twice about whether he wants to continue in his footsteps. Meanwhile, Chloe and Dov cannot agree on how to deal with a disgruntled client

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division is looking forward to celebrating Frank and Noelle's wedding when a casino-bound bus full of senior citizens to robbed at gunpoint. The wedding preparations also go awry after Traci discovers the bride has disappeared, but Andy's day turns from disaster to triumph as she and Nick share an unexpectedly intimate moment

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A controversial talk show host is shot dead in the street and suspicion initially falls on a woman who was suing him for sexual harassment. However, later evidence leads the team to the victim's wife, who stands to inherit $5million, and a stalker who claims to be having an affair with her. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two room-mates are found bludgeoned to death in their flat, and the handyman is the prime suspect. As his options run out, he takes a hostage, forcing Southerlyn into a course of action that could jeopardise her career. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Gene Silvers, and Elisabeth Rohm

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a state senator suspected of involvement in the disappearance of one of his aides. Their progress is hindered by a lack of evidence, but when her body is found in a marsh, the case turns into a murder inquiry. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A car bomb kills the husband of an incapacitated woman shortly before he planned to switch off her life support. Fontana and Green are drawn into a heated debate about the right to die, and find themselves faced with two suspects who both have iron-clad alibis

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a woman whose scantily clad body is found on the Upper East Side. Initially believing her to be a prostitute, they learn she was a doctor who had been handing out unauthorised doses of a powerful drug. The hunt for her killer leads the team into a web of deceit and blackmail, with a Russian mobster and his son seemingly pulling the strings

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The first instalment of a two-part crossover with NCIS: New Orleans sees the Washington, DC team co-operating with their colleagues from the Big Easy to investigate a spate of lethal poisonings on board a New Orleans-to-DC flight. All the evidence seems to point to missing chef Luca, who happens to be Abby's brother, so the two investigative services join forces to locate him, and find out why a private tech firm seems to have been targetted by the killer. Naval crime drama, guest starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects foul play when a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury dies before he can make his court appearance. When it becomes clear the man was murdered, the subsequent investigation reveals that a previously thwarted human-trafficking ring has been re-established. Meanwhile, a storm causes a massive power outage, and McGee seeks a room for the night among his colleagues. Naval crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the Secretary of the Navy, learns her daughter has been kidnapped, and the NCIS crew teams up with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring the abducted girl home. Meanwhile, McGee's childhood friend, NCIS Special Agent Valerie Page, arrives in town to assist with advanced tactics training. Naval crime drama, guest starring Leslie Hope and Christina Chang

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team looks into a raid on a naval base, and Dr Cyril Taft - the surgeon who saved Gibbs' life - experiences the thrill of assisting on an investigation. Assigned to treat Gibbs' suspect, Taft manages to uncover evidence that may prove crucial to solving the case. Meanwhile, DiNozzo pays his old flame Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan. Guest starring John Cryer and Scottie Thompson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee and Torres visit the home of a high-school student who witnessed a hit-and-run, but her parents flee with their daughter, leaving NCIS in the lurch

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is asked to disprove accusations against a congressman, but the investigation leads them to uncover a real sex trafficking ring

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An aspiring Olympic athlete claims she is a rape victim, but the publicity could threaten her Olympic future, and reveal some shocking details about her sordid personal life

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson discovers that a young man facing rape charges is the son of a sergeant - her first police partner - who comes to her asking to cash in on an a favour that she owes him. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Kate Beckett faces the toughest case of her career after finding Castle's car engulfed in flames. He is dragged out, apparently kidnapped, and disappears for weeks until being found in drifting unconscious at sea suffering amnesia. Perplexingly, camera footage suggests he helped stage and finance his abduction. American crime drama, starring Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The murder of a toy company boss uncovers a lead to Castle's mysterious disappearance, launching him off into his own investigation - but before long he finds himself in danger

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Chris's reunion with his family is thwarted in shocking fashion when his son Christian is kidnapped while in Andy and Nick's care. As the squad spreads out to search for the boy, Swarek is forced to deal with Andy and Nick's budding relationship, and officers later discover clues to the identity of Christian's abductor - hitting his father with a stunning revelation that threatens to tear his new family apart

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A routine bust in a drugs den soon becomes Detective Nash's first solo homicide case. Meanwhile, Officer Shaw buys a cabin in the woods, Andy tries to find the right time to tell Gail that she slept with Nick, and Traci makes it clear to Steve Peck that she is not looking to date anyone for the time being. Starring Missy Peregrym

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Borgia prosecute a famous basketball player accused of murdering a fan who had been harassing him for some time. They discover the star's fingerprints in the victim's apartment, but the evidence linking him to the crime scene is dismissed as inadmissible because the detectives cut corners to find a match on the police database. Starring Sam Waterston and Annie Parisse

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe the fatal stabbing of psychologist Tracy Conley may be linked to confidential client information on her computer. They learn one of the files on her hard drive has been tampered with since her death - information that would have ensured a known rapist spends another five years behind bars. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl is found suffocated to death in Central Park, Briscoe and Green discover her adoptive mother's attempts to discipline the child may have inadvertently caused the tragedy. However, the case is thrown into confusion when a post-mortem reveals she may actually have died of an allergic reaction. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse with a social agenda is arrested on suspicion of performing illegal sterilisations on troubled teenagers without their knowledge - a policy that has resulted in the death of one patient. As McCoy and Borgia prepare their case against her, they discover former ADA Paul Robinette is planning to act for the defence

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a spate of murders and find a recurring pattern, leading them to believe they have a serial killer on their hands. They soon find a suspect, who admits to killing 15 women - but he then puts a disconcerting spin on things by claiming his attorney knows more about the crimes than they realise

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to investigate the murder of a notorious bounty hunter. Piecing together his final movements, they turn their attentions to a meeting between the victim and an ambitious journalist, which may be able to shed light on what happened

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A deep-sea diver is murdered on the job, and his co-workers all become suspects. However, when they return to the surface, they must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days. With each of their suspects confined within a tank, the NCIS team must complete an unorthodox investigation from the outside. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the Secretary of the Navy, learns her daughter has been kidnapped, and the NCIS crew teams up with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring the abducted girl home. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A day spent working on a cut-and-dried case leaves the team free to spend some time away from work, and while McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of keeping shop-talk to a minimum, DiNozzo ends up boring his dinner date with crime-solving tales. However, the agents' personal plans are all interrupted as, one-by-one, they realise errors have been made in closing their latest investigation. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the apparent suicide of a pupil at a prestigious private school turns out to be murder, Goren and Eames investigate the complex social hierarchy among the students and uncover an online community with secrets to hide. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.desc: The antiques show pitting two experts against each other in a nationwide treasure-hunting contest returns. Veteran road-tripper David Barby sets the competition in motion by joining Margie Cooper for an auction-hopping journey from Northumberland to Lincolnshire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It is day two and antiques experts David Barby and Margie Cooper are battling it out in Co Durham before wending their way down the coast to auction in Scarborough, North Yorkshire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Barby and Margie Cooper embark on the third day of their trip from Bridlington to Sheffield, and purchase some surprising items they hope will prove popular with buyers and make them a profit at auction

programme.desc: Tina Watkins has long struggled to get on the housing ladder in the UK. Now, she has decided to make the most of the incredibly good value property in Spain's Granada province and buy her first-ever home. With her best friend Jamie along to help, Jasmine Harman shows Tina just how far her £19,000 budget will stretch

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jon and Lynne Scopes from Stockport have thought about buying a property abroad for years and have viewed more than 40 apartments without success, but have at least decided their ideal area is Mijas on Spain's Costa del Sol. Jasmine Harman has the daunting task of finding them the perfect property for their £100,000 budget, but will anything meet their exacting standards?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Mike and Amanda Gadd and their two children have always holidayed on the Algarve, a place that holds a special place in their hearts. Mike often works away with his job as a salesman, so they've decided to buy a holiday home there to give them a place to spend quality time together. Ben Hillman shows them five properties around their favourite town of Vilamoura for their £127,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Debbie and Tony Parkes have been married for 40 years, and are ready for a new chapter in their lives. With retirement around the corner, they've set their hearts on a holiday home in Albufeira on Portugal's Algarve with a budget of £80,000

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: The documentary follows the paramedics of the West Midlands Ambulance Service over three shifts in Staffordshire, where staff are seeing an increasing number of social issues, drug and alcohol misuse and mental health patients. Dom and Sue are called to the address of a potentially violent woman, followed by a callout to a young heroin addict. Jordan and Katie attend to 21-year-old Stephen, who has tried to kill himself by jumping from a bridge into a canal, while Mark and Verity treat 35-year-old Brett, who has suffered alcohol dependency for 18 years and does not know where to turn

programme.desc: Christian Jessen meets a patient with an extremely sore penis, a woman born without a vagina and a builder whose mystery allergy has left his skin weeping all over. Family man Alan, who was left paralysed from the waist down after a motorbike accident, visits Pixie McKenna to find out how it would feel to stand again. Can the latest technology fulfil his dream? In Magaluf, the doctors treat the walking wounded for their holiday mishaps and Pixie catches up with the four volunteers the morning after the night before

programme.title: Go Kart Go (1964)
programme.desc: A group of children builds a go kart for a race, but a rival team plots to sabotage their efforts. Family drama, starring Dennis Waterman and Frazer Hines

programme.title: Friend or Foe (1982)
programme.desc: Two Second World War evacuees face a dilemma when they meet a German pilot who has been shot down. Family drama, starring John Bardon and Stacey Tendeter

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a music executive and an interior designer find their dream home in Barbados. The couple are used to fighting to get what they want and know a thing or two about houses - so finding a satisfactory property is going to be especially hard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Victoria Hollingsworth helps a sporty couple find a holiday home in Hawaii where they can indulge their passion for surfing. They visit lofts and flats set in tropical gardens and apartments with pools, hoping to find the perfect place on a budget of £200,000

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Jasper Jones (2017)
programme.desc: When a town outcast suspected of murder shows 14-year-old Charlie Bucktin a dead body, the teenager attempts to find the killer. Mystery thriller, starring Levi Miller, Aaron McGrath and Angourie Rice

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: Black Gunn
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Deep End (1970)
programme.desc: A 15-year-old boy gets a job working at a swimming pool, and discovers his work includes providing sexual services to the patrons in exchange for tips. He lusts obsessively after a woman who works alongside him, and begins plotting to break up her engagement. Comedy drama, starring John Moulder-Brown and Jane Asher

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.desc: The girls catch up with their old friends Dee Dee and Dwayne at a surfing contest in Polynesia, but the event is attacked by a giant octopus

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls attend a roller-skating contest, and investigate when someone seems to be sabotaging the competition

programme.desc: Gilby challenges Vic to a climbing contest, with the winner joining the crew of the Drakkar

programme.desc: Faxe steals sausages from an Icelandic king, which results in the whole crew getting held to ransom

programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends build a boardwalk so they can get to the water park easily

programme.title: Opening Up the Soane
programme.desc: Documentary about the extensive refurbishment of Sir John Soane's Museum to restore the building to its original glory

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams visits Ashford and the Medway towns of Kent to recount grisly tales from the Second World War about bodies found in the rubble of the Blitz which turned out to be victims of murder

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple who have decided to sell their B&B farmhouse in Devon and make their home Down Under in Sydney discover their £400,000 will soon be swallowed up in the highly desirable city. However, their hopes are raised when they find a restored Edwardian country house and an architect-designed property overlooking the harbour on offer at £93,000 under budget

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow experiences what New York was like at the height of the Industrial Revolution. Millions fled to escape the persecution, poverty and famine of 19th-century Europe, only to be confronted by living conditions worse than those they had left behind. He explores the overcrowded slums of Lower Manhattan, which were a breeding ground for cholera and typhoid, and has a go at cooking using clothes dye and floor cleaner - ingredients that were added to meals to disguise the smell of spoiled meat. He also discovers how certain feats of engineering transformed not only the city, but the world

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars

programme.title: Doctors In The War Zone
programme.desc: The United Nations estimates almost 200,000 people have been killed since Syria's civil war began, with many hundreds of thousands more injured. Millions have been forced from their homes, but the full human cost of the conflict is little known to the outside world because of the danger Western journalists face in trying to enter areas not controlled by the government. Most doctors have fled from those locations and many hospitals have been destroyed, but this documentary follows British trauma surgeon David Nott as he makes the perilous journey across the border into Syria to work alongside medics who have stayed behind. He carries out life-saving surgery in a facility forced underground by daily bombardment

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: MMA and K1 from the Circus Tavern, including Rob Earls v Ben Claude, Aidas v Dontel Forester and Catalin Pintilie v Sheridan

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Elenya (1992)
programme.desc: Aa 12-year-old half-Italian Welsh schoolgirl stumbles across a wounded German airman during the Second World War and secretly cares for him - only for tragedy to strike as the local townsfolk discover what she has been up to. Drama, starring Pascale Delafourge Jones, Klaus Behrendt, Margaret John and Sue Jones Davies

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams looks at the role - and the unusual odd jobs - of country policemen in the South and South East during the Second World War, when rumours of chicken stealing and illegal pig roasts were fairly common diversions from the privations of rationing

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk (1944)
programme.desc: Two tough Australian soldiers fight alongside an intellectual Englishman in the North African campaign. They become involved in a critical siege, and their fearless efforts manage to hold up the German advance for months. Second World War drama, starring Grant Taylor, Peter Finch and Chips Rafferty

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple with a budget of £80,000 fly out to Puerto Vallarta on Mexico's Pacific coast in search of a holiday home they can rent out to fund a trip round the world. The glorious weather and beaches are matched by bargain-priced properties, including a seaview apartment, a family home with separate studio and a coastal penthouse boasting its own pool

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Luftwaffe chief and designated successor to Hitler, Hermann Goering. The larger-than-life character was renowned for his charisma and flamboyance, but also as one of the most unrepentant and ruthless of all Nazis. Having aimed to use the courtroom as a means of rehabilitating the fascist regime, it was only at a late stage that he was forced to concede defeat. Robert Pugh stars

programme.title: How to Stay Young
programme.desc: In the second of two documentaries about beating the ageing process, Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken find out what people can do to give their brains a boost. Angela travels to Japan, where she discovers the foods that can help protect your brain, and meets the 100-year-old who is living proof of the importance of diet in keeping the grey matter healthy. In the USA, Chris finds out about a trial in which scientists are hoping to beat Alzheimer's disease by injecting sufferers with the blood of young people

programme.title: Bare Knuckle
programme.desc: Documentary exploring bare knuckle boxing's rise in popularity, its evolution through centuries, legal issues & the fight to give modern day boxers professional recognition

programme.title: Hooligan Escape: The Russian Job (2018)
programme.desc: Five British football fans are arrested while attending the World Cup in Russia. However, their problems get even worse when a corrupt guard hands them over to an old enemy who has been plotting revenge for years. Thriller, starring Ali Bastian and Charlie Wernham

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: A twisted tale of strange desires, perverse pleasures and the ultimate corruption of innocence as told by the Marquis de Sade

programme.title: Love Is the Devil (1998)
programme.desc: The story of George Dyer, a petty criminal who became the model and lover of leading Dublin-born artist Francis Bacon. Hopelessly at odds with Bacon's cynical, sophisticated milieu and bewildered by the painter's cruelty toward him, Dyer sought refuge in drugs and alcohol. British fact-based drama, starring Derek Jacobi, Daniel Craig, Tilda Swinton and Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Richmond and Bellingham for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Wartime drama starring Anthony Andrews as young officer Brian Ash who joins the UXB unit during the Blitz the military organisation responsible for defusing unexploded German bombs

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Sam, Michael, Ashley and Hilary pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser.
